commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared Claude Code version resolver, uses it in both Anthropic OAuth user-agent builders, and adds a small version-format test.

PR surface: Source +20, Tests +8. Total +28 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main and v2026.6.8 shows both Anthropic OAuth request builders still send `claude-cli/2.1.75`; I did not run a live Anthropic OAuth request because valid user credentials are required.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR has a narrow correctness defect plus an external contributor proof gap, and automation should not proceed while the real behavior proof gate is open.
